en.name: Bridges
en.desc: Connect islands with bridges! Each island shows how many bridges connect to it. Bridges run horizontally or vertically and never cross. Build the network!
en.howToPlay: Click between islands to build bridges. Each island's number shows required bridge connections. Bridges run horizontally/vertically and cannot cross.
tips: Islands with 8 need 4 bridges in each direction
Corner 4s need 2 bridges in each available direction
Plan routes to avoid bridge crossings
All islands must be connected in one network

zh.name: 造桥
zh.desc: 用桥连接岛屿！每个岛屿显示连接到它的桥数。桥水平或垂直延伸，永不交叉。构建你的网络！
zh.howToPlay: 点击岛屿之间的格子来画桥。可以在两个岛之间画一到两座桥。所有岛屿必须连通。单个岛屿不能有超过两座桥连接到另一个岛屿。
tips: 从角上的1开始——它们只有一种选择
不能有超过两座桥的任何连接
确保所有岛屿最终连通
使用排除法找到必要的桥梁
